prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 56.2 kg; Height 150.9 cm; BMI 24.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.6%; 6 months ago 9.1%; 3 months ago 8.6%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 215mg/dL; 9 months ago 212mg/dL; 6 months ago 255mg/dL; 3 months ago 198mg/dL; current 221mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.7kg; 9 months ago 56.1kg; 6 months ago 56.7kg; 3 months ago 55.3kg; current 56.2kg), Height (12 months ago 150.9cm; 9 months ago 150.9cm; 6 months ago 150.9cm; 3 months ago 150.9cm; current 150.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 138mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 83mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 54U/L; 9 months ago 61U/L; 6 months ago 59U/L; 3 months ago 59U/L; current 56U/L), AST (12 months ago 38U/L; 9 months ago 46U/L; 6 months ago 39U/L; 3 months ago 38U/L; current 40U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 410mg/g; 9 months ago 475mg/g; 6 months ago 375mg/g; 3 months ago 391mg/g; current 497mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 89mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 149mg/dL; 6 months ago 167mg/dL; 3 months ago 170mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.4g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
